title: Block Builder's Guild
short_description: Craft doors, beds and bookshelves from exact plank-and-log maths — order wrong and the Mole Miners' Union files a grievance.
description: You're the newest apprentice at the Guild workshop in a blocky crafting world. Customers order doors, beds, bookshelves and brick ovens — you work out exactly how many planks, logs and stones each job takes using the crafting recipes (1 log = 4 planks, 1 stone = 2 bricks). Order too much or too little and the Mole Miners' Union files an extremely formal grievance. Grade bands ramp from simple plank counting, to two-step log-to-plank conversions, to three-step brick chains and how-many-can-you-build division with leftovers. A free online multiplication, division and multi-step word problem game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the number of planks, logs or stones the order needs.
